# 函数: InitDataConsumer()

```ts
function InitDataConsumer(props: ConsumerProps<InitData>): null | ReactElement<any, string | JSXElementConstructor<any>>
```

The [Consumer](https://react.dev/reference/react/createContext#consumer) Component that provide `initData`.
This should be used with [InitDataProvider](/api/react/Function.InitDataProvider.mdx)
